problem.summary: Compare a direct global-memory tile transform against an LDS-tiled path intended for explicit software-pipelined staging on ROCm GPUs.
outputs: output contains a copied or lightly transformed row-major matrix
constraints: Actual inline AMD GCN ISA or library-assisted LDS staging path is TODO
Record gfx target and fallback path
Do not claim async-copy benefit without profiler or timing evidence

verification.method: Compare copied output against input for all elements.

curation.notes: The optimized source is a safe LDS staging placeholder with TODO markers for wait/barrier discipline and pipeline stages.
